eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Shasta, CA; at 12:24 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 4:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mandatory evacuation order issued by the Shasta County Sheriffs office in the area of Portero at Encanto due to vegetation fire
